title: Defined Terms
full_text:
1.2.1.2 Defined Terms
Defined Terms
1) The words and terms in italics in Division B shall have the meanings assigned
to them in Article 1.4.1.2. of Division A.
2) For the purposes of this Code, a semi-heated building is considered to be a
building with a design set-point temperature of less than 15°C.

sentences.text: The words and terms in italics in Division B shall have the meanings assigned to them in Article 1.4.1.2. of Division A.
For the purposes of this Code, a semi-heated building is considered to be a building with a design set-point temperature of less than 15°C.
